content.problemStatement: What is the purpose of the `closegraph()` function?
constraints: The output string must not be empty.
content.outputFormat: Print the purpose of the closegraph() function.

sampleTestCases.output: The closegraph() function closes the graphics mode and deallocates any resources used by the graphics system.
sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the required description.

sampleTestCases.output: The closegraph() function closes the graphics mode and deallocates any resources used by the graphics system.

solution.approach: The problem requires printing a fixed description of the closegraph() function. No computation is needed; simply output the required sentence followed by a newline.

code.JavaScript: console.log("The closegraph() function closes the graphics mode and deallocates any resources used by the graphics system.");
